description: Each of 10 altered-state personas covers a public domain folk/blues song in their own voice. A collaborative album where every artist shares a song with the others.
note: Two personas (Ayahuasca, 5-MeO-DMT) independently chose The Unquiet Grave. Their covers are intentionally distinct: Ayahuasca = ancestral grief narrative, 5-MeO-DMT = formless dissolution.
